ai_only: By providing your phone number you agree to receive informational text messages from Hotman Group.

ai.notes: The form uses a dynamic AngularJS questionnaire system. Some fields are generated via JavaScript and may not appear in the initial static HTML.

fields.question: Upload Resume
Full Name
Email Address
Phone Number
By providing your phone number you agree to receive informational text messages from Hotman Group.
Address
Desired Salary
Salary Period
Experience Summary
Cover Letter
Are you legally authorized to work in the United States for any employer?
Will you now, or in the future, require sponsorship for employment visa status (e.g. H-1B visa status)?
Have you signed any non-competes that would hinder you working for Hotman Group?
Are you physically located in the United States?
In what city/ state do you live?
Are you willing to undergo a background check, in accordance with local law/regulations?
Will your background check return favorable?
Are you able and willing to work full-time?
When are you available to start?
Are you able and willing to provide references?
What are your compensation expectations for this role? Please provide a monetary range to be considered.
How do you identify the right companies and decision-makers that align with a company’s offerings?
How do you confirm that a prospect is worth engaging?
Walk us through how you would design a multi-channel outreach sequence (phone, email, LinkedIn, etc.) based on what has worked for you in the past.
Give an example of a time when you had to be especially creative or persistent to get a response from a prospect. What did you do, and what was the outcome?
Do you see yourself as someone who focuses on setting the stage for others to close, or do you prefer carrying the opportunity through to closing yourself? Why?
What prospecting tools or processes have you used to work smarter, not just harder? How do you bring efficiency into your daily routine?
Why are you interested in working with Hotman Group?
Where do you see yourself professionally in 5 or 10 years?
What excites you most about outbound sales and business development?
What aspects of your skills and personality make you a strong fit for this role?
Is there anything else you would like us to know about your qualifications or experience?
Hotman Group uses AI-based screening tools to detect plagiarism.
